banner.title: Reserve your table at Aaradhya Grand.
banner.subtitle: Planning a family brunch, group lunch, party, or business meeting? Let us know ahead of time.

experiences.title: Three ways to dine with us.
experiences.subtitle: Whether it's a quick breakfast stop or a private celebration — we have the perfect setting.

items.name: Indoor Dining
items.summary: Royal ambience with upscale décor, warm lighting, and both table and counter service.

items.name: Outdoor Seating
items.summary: Fresh air dining in our outdoor area — casual and comfortable.

items.name: Party Hall
items.summary: Private party hall for celebrations, birthdays, corporate events, and group gatherings.

form.title: Tell us about your reservation.
form.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll confirm your table. Brunch and lunch reservations recommended.
form.promise: We respond to every request. For immediate assistance, call us at +91 81970 06999 or +91 99022 62999.

items.title: Request received
items.description: Your details reach our team — we check availability for your preferred date and time.

items.title: Confirmation call
items.description: We call or message you to confirm your table and discuss any special requirements.

items.title: You're all set
items.description: Arrive at Aaradhya Grand and your table will be ready — indoor, outdoor, or party hall.

items.title: Enjoy your meal
items.description: Relax in our royal ambience and enjoy pure veg flavors. Quick service, warm staff, and great food.
